message:
🐛 Remove duplicate in-repo Prow config (#173)

The presubmit jobs defined in .prow.yaml are duplicated with the
central Prow config in kubestellar/infra. This duplication causes
tide to fail with error:

  duplicated presubmit jobs (consider both inrepo and central config)

Removing the in-repo config to fix tide merging for this repository.
The jobs are still defined in the central config at:
  prow/jobs/kubestellar/a2a/a2a-presubmits.yaml

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,91 +0,0 @@
-presubmits:
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-a2a-verify
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: 'https://github.com/kubestellar/a2a'
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: python:3.11
-          command:
-            - /bin/bash
-            - -c
-            - |
-              # Install uv package manager
-              curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
-              export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH"
-              
-              # Install dependencies
-              uv sync --dev
-              
-              # Run tests with pytest and coverage
-              uv run pytest tests/ -v --cov=src/ --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 2Gi
-              cpu: 1
-              ephemeral-storage: 4Gi
-  
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-a2a-verify-py312
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: 'https://github.com/kubestellar/a2a'
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: python:3.12
-          command:
-            - /bin/bash
-            - -c
-            - |
-              # Install uv package manager
-              curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
-              export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH"
-              
-              # Install dependencies
-              uv sync --dev
-              
-              # Run tests with pytest and coverage
-              uv run pytest tests/ -v --cov=src/ --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 2Gi
-              cpu: 1
-              ephemeral-storage: 4Gi
-  
-  - name: pull-kubestellar-a2a-lint
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: 'https://github.com/kubestellar/a2a'
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: python:3.11
-          command:
-            - /bin/bash
-            - -c
-            - |
-              # Install uv package manager
-              curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
-              export PATH="/root/.local/bin:$PATH"
-              
-              # Install dependencies
-              uv sync --dev
-              
-              # Lint with ruff
-              echo "Running ruff..."
-              uv run ruff check src/ tests/ --fix
-              
-              # Check formatting with black
-              echo "Checking formatting with black..."
-              uv run black src/ tests/ --check --diff
-              
-              # Check import sorting with isort
-              echo "Checking import sorting with isort..."
-              uv run isort --check-only src/ tests/
-              
-              # Type check with mypy (non-blocking)
-              echo "Type checking with mypy..."
-              uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports || echo "Type checking issues found (non-blocking)"
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 1Gi
-              cpu: 1
-              ephemeral-storage: 4Gi
\ No newline at end of file
